message:
Extract writeToWasm helper, deduplicate input encoding in parse/feed

Three call sites (parse, feed, writeKeyToMemory) each had their own
string-vs-Uint8Array encoding + ensureBuf logic. Unified into single
writeToWasm(input, buf, extraCap, minCap) that handles both types.

parse(): 8-line block → 1-line call with extraCap=64 for autocomplete
feed(): 8-line block → 1-line call with extraCap=0
writeKeyToMemory: 7-line body → 2-line delegate with empty-key guard

Also hoisted empty-chunk check in feed() before the type branch.
